codeReview.summary: The fix directly addresses the prior blocking race by capturing scenario context before async mutations and routing command pushes to that captured scenario. `undoRedoStore.pushCommand` now accepts an explicit target scenario, and all async mutation paths in `orgStore` updated by this feature (add/update/remove/move/bulk update/bulk delete) pass the captured scenario ID, preventing commands from being recorded against a newly active scenario after mid-flight switches.

summary: Reviewed feature metadata, handoff, fix transcript skeleton, prior failed review, and both commit diffs (2321401015ddcac3a2a665407704f6b6efd454ac and 3620217cb3a4af30858325964d577d87b370cdb9). The fix adequately resolves the original cross-scenario undo-stack corruption failure and is approved.
